babyDevelopment: Limb buds (future arms and legs) appear. The brain is growing complex, generating 100 new brain cells every minute.
bodyChanges: Your blood volume is expanding. You might notice subtle skin changes or acne due to hormones. You still don't show.
tips: Take photos of your tummy before it grows

do: Use mild cleansers on your face
Communicate your needs to your partner
dont: Forget to pee often to avoid UTIs

travelAdvisory.note: Travel remains safe. Get aisle seats for frequent bathroom trips.

milestoneDescription: Tiny arms and legs are sprouting out, making the embryo look less like a tadpole.
